language.label: Luqad
language.onboardingQuestion: Waa maxay luqaddaada ama lahjadaada aad doorbideyso?
language.appLoading: Waxaa la soo dejinayaa luqadda aad doorbiday...

home.heroText: Ku xooji iimaankaaga xusuusinno, muxaadarooyin, iyo aqoon Islaami ah oo faa'iido leh.

remember.title: Xusuuso Allah
remember.text: Runtii quluubtu waxay ku xasilloon tahay xuska Allah.
remember.reason: Xus joogto ah wuxuu dejinayaa qalbiga, wuxuu xoojiyaa tawakkulka, wuxuuna kaa caawiyaa inaad xasillooni ku jawaabto marka culays jiro.

salah.title: Ilaali Salaaddaada
salah.text: Salaaddu waa xiriirkaaga maalinlaha ah ee Allah.
salah.reason: Salaaddu waxay dhistaa nidaam, waxay maalintaada ku xidhaa cibaado, waxayna kaa ilaalisaa caadooyin waxyeello leh.

gratitude.title: Ku Dhaqan Mahadnaq
gratitude.text: Allah uga mahadnaq nimco kasta, mid yar iyo mid weyn.
gratitude.reason: Mahadnaqu wuxuu ka wareejiyaa dareenka wax kaa maqan una jeediyaa waxa Allah ku siiyay, taasoo kordhisa qanacsanaanta iyo adkaynta ruuxiga ah.

charity.title: Sadaqo Bixi
charity.text: Ficil kasta oo samafal ah ajar ayuu leeyahay.
charity.reason: Sadaqadu waxay daahirisaa maalka, waxayna taageertaa dadka baahan, waxayna qalbigaaga ku kobcisaa naxariis adigoo ajar ka helaya Allah.

patience.title: Samir Yeelo
patience.text: Allah wuxuu la jiraa kuwa samra.
patience.reason: Samirku wuxuu kaa caawiyaa inaad qiyamkaaga ku adkaysato imtixaannada, kana fogaato falcelin aad ka qoomamayso, adigoo rajo ku haya qorshaha Allah.

quran.title: Akhri Qur'aanka
quran.text: Maanta waqti yar ku bixi akhris iyo tafakkur.
quran.reason: Akhriska Qur'aanku wuxuu bixiyaa hanuun, wuxuu daweeyaa madhnaanta ruuxiga ah, wuxuuna go'aannadaada ku hogaamiyaa xaq iyo ujeeddo.

live.title: Join beneficial broadcasts in real time

scholars.title: Learn from trusted scholars and educators

auth.joinCommunity: Ku biir bulshada Marakah daqiiqado gudahood.
auth.mobileFlow: On phone, sign in with fingerprint or facial recognition, or use username and password.
auth.desktopFlow: Soo gal si aad u sii waddo safarkaaga barasho.
auth.biometricUnsupported: Biometric sign-in is not supported on this device/browser.
auth.noAuthenticator: No Face ID/Fingerprint authenticator is available.
auth.biometricFailed: Biometric sign-in was cancelled or failed. Please try again.
auth.mobileInstruction: On phone, sign in with fingerprint or facial recognition, or use username and password.

translation.dialogQuestion: Luqaddee ayaad rabtaa in boggan lagu turjumo?
translation.dialogQuestionEnglish: What language would you like this page translated into?

masjids.title: Find real nearby masjids

status.allowLocation: Allow location access to find nearest masjids nationwide.
status.searchHint: Use current location for nearest masjids nationwide, or enter a city manually.
status.enterCity: Enter a city or enable current location first.
status.noResults: No masjids found for that search.
status.locationUnavailable: Location is unavailable: your browser does not support geolocation.
status.locationDenied: Location permission denied. Allow location access in browser settings or search by city, state, or ZIP.
status.locationUnknown: Location unavailable right now. Check your device location services and try again.
status.locationTimeout: Location request timed out. Please try again or search by city, state, or ZIP.
status.locationFailed: Could not determine your location. Search by city, state, or ZIP instead.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Track your progress, stay consistent, and keep everything important in one place.

empty.activities: No lectures or events saved yet. Add one to begin building your journey.
empty.photos: No photos saved yet. Add a photo, screenshot, or memory from your device.
empty.reminders: No favorite reminders saved yet. Save a reminder that you would like to revisit.
empty.lectures: No lectures or events saved yet. Add one to begin building your journey.
empty.events: No saved events yet. Save events from the Events page to see them here.

validation.unsupportedImageType: This image type is not supported. Use JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, or HEIC.
validation.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum allowed size is 5 MB.
validation.chooseImage: Please choose an image before saving.

identity.title: Qowmiyad, Dhaxal, ama Taageero
identity.description: Si ikhtiyaari ah u dooro Calanka Profile-ka adiga oo ku saleynaya dhaxalka ama taageerada. Marakah waxa uu dabaqaa oo keliya waxa aad adigu gacanta ku doorato.
identity.supportOnlyDescription: Taageerada Falastiin waxay muujisaa calanka Falastiin sidii asalka taageero ikhtiyaari ah.

messages.saved: Doorashada Calanka Profile-ka waa la kaydiyey.
messages.cancelled: Isbeddellada aan la kaydin waa la joojiyey.
messages.removed: Doorashada Calanka Profile-ka waa la saaray.

validation.mustDiffer: Dooro laba dhaxal oo kala duwan.

details.bioPlaceholder: Add a short bio to introduce your learning journey.

admin.masjidTitle: Dashboard overview for your local masjid

seo.homeTitle: Marakah | Barasho Islaami ah, Xasuusin iyo Bulsho
seo.homeDescription: Ka hel xasuusin Islaami ah, casharro toos ah, masaajid kuu dhow iyo dhacdooyin bulshada dhexdeeda ah gudaha Marakah.
seo.liveDescription: Ku biir casharrada Islaamiga ah ee tooska ah iyo wareegyada Qur'aanka ee Marakah.
seo.recordingsDescription: Baadh duubista khudbadaha iyo muxaadarooyinka Islaamiga ah.
seo.masjidsDescription: Raadi masaajid kuu dhow oo arag waqtiyada salaadda iyo dhacdooyinka.
seo.scholarsDescription: Wax ka baro culimo iyo macallimiin la isku halayn karo.
seo.eventsDescription: Sahamso dhacdooyinka soo socda ee bulshada Islaamka.
seo.feedDescription: La soco wararka waxtarka leh ee bulshada Marakah.
seo.profileDescription: La soco horumarkaaga, xasuusinnadaada iyo hawlahaaga.
seo.loginDescription: Si ammaan ah u soo gal si aad u sii waddo safarkaaga barashada Islaamka.
seo.signupDescription: Samee koonto Marakah oo ku biir bulshada.
seo.masjidDashboardDescription: Dashboard maamulka masaajidka ee xaadiritaanka, fasallada iyo mutadawiciinta.
